headlines.title: Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh takes on a starring role in Maine’s Senate race
headlines.description: In a time of war and rising prices, Democrats in Maine say another issue is motivating them in the Senate race: Brett Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court confirmation eight years ago.

headlines.title: Judge warns DOJ not to ‘play possum’ with ‘anti-weaponization’ fund it says is dead
headlines.description: The Trump administration has said the fund isn’t moving forward, but the president has said he’d like to pay purported victims “the kind of money that they deserve.”

headlines.title: Trump Says 'I Love the Inflation' as Consumer Price Index Rises
headlines.description: After newly-released federal data showed inflation spiking to its highest level in three years, driven in large part by the soaring gas and oil prices related to the United States’ war with Iran, President Donald Trump reacted saying, “I love the inflation.” He later said that what he meant to say is that “despite the fact that we’re in a war, the numbers are much lower than anticipated.” NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Fears of All Out War Grow as US-Iran Strikes Continue to Intensify
headlines.description: Concerns of a return to an all-out war are growing as the United States and Iran trade a new round of attacks in a second day of strikes. It comes as President Donald Trump says he would "bomb the s---- out of them" unless Iran signs a deal. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Bill Gates grilled by lawmakers over Epstein ties
headlines.description: Billionaire and Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates was grilled by lawmakers over his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Gates said that Epstein was blackmailing him over his infidelities. NBC News’ Hallie Jackson reports.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as annual rate jumps to a 3-year high
headlines.description: The president suggested the recent numbers mean there will be a bigger decline in inflation once the war in Iran is over.

headlines.title: Former New York Comptroller Brad Lander stands trial over arrest at ICE facility
headlines.description: The congressional hopeful’s trial began Wednesday, months after he was arrested at an ICE facility while he was inspecting conditions for immigrants held there.

headlines.title: The limits of self-funding: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Ben Kamisar takes stock of the half-billion dollars Tom Steyer has spent over the course of two unsuccessful bids for office.

headlines.title: Defense industry leaders to meet with Trump amid missile supply worries, sources say
headlines.description: The president is expected to press the leaders to find ways to swiftly increase production of weaponry for the Pentagon, sources told NBC News.

headlines.title: Democrats await ranked choice vote in Maine to decide key House nominee
headlines.description: Republicans want to flip a pro-Trump, Democratic-held House seat as part of their plans to hold onto their slim majority in the House.
